title.en: Under such rules of the game, it is unlikely th...

content.en:
There are a total of 102 participants in the third group, and the top 10 of this group must be finished in order to advance to the third round.

And Ye Tian needed to fight 100 battles, so there would only be one person who would not fight him.

Under such rules of the game, it is unlikely that the strong will be eliminated.

After all, the major forces will evenly divide the double overrunners into each group, and there will not be a situation where more than a dozen double overlimits are in the same group.

Therefore, under such rules, if it is eliminated, it is a lack of strength, and there is no other reason.

Soon, the group stage began.

Originally, the huge ring in the first round was instantly divided into a large number of rings under the power of the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor.

Suddenly, one contestant entered the ring one by one to fight.

Ye Tian also played, the other party is the strength of an ordinary one-heavy overrunner, such strength is already quite good, but in the face of Ye Tian, it is a move to be killed in seconds.

After a game, some of the games are very slow, and they fight each other for a long time before they can end the game.

If a match takes too long, the Fire Emblem Warlord will speed up the time in that ring, so that the end time of that ring is the same as the other rings.

In such a situation, the game passed one by one, and the speed was fast.

Ye Tian had almost no rest, and after the game, he quickly played the second, third, and fourth games......

Because Ye Tian's strength is very strong, when he encounters an opponent, he kills the opponent in seconds.

The opponents in the second round are basically the first overlimiters, and there are very few double overlimiters, because the double overlimits are basically concentrated in the Holy Gate.

For example, there are only eight double overrunners, and if you add the two people who came after, there are only ten people.

The Ten Holy Gates, at most, more than 100 double overlimiters, are divided into 100 ancestors, most groups are afraid that there is only one double overlimiter, and only a few groups will have two double overlimiters.

Ye Tian's group doesn't seem to be very strong, at least Ye Tian hasn't found a double overlimit until now.

Time passed day by day, and before I knew it, half a month passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had completed 100 battles, and all of them were in their heyday, and he was promoted to the third round as the first in the group.

Some groups have completed the second round, while others are still playing, but the exact end time is about the same.

Another day passed, and the second round was over.

1,000 contestants entered the third round, and Ye Tian found that two people were eliminated from the battle gate, and only 18 advanced to the third round.

Those two are really a little unlucky, they must have entered a stronger group, otherwise with the strength of their top overrunners, they will not be eliminated.

Of course, such strength enters the third round, and it is also a part of being quickly eliminated.

"Now the third round begins!" Fire Emblem War Ancestor reappeared, "The third round of the tournament is divided into a challenge system, and we will put the top 100 people in the group first, and the next 900 people will also be ranked in turn. The ranking is based entirely on the performance of the group stage, if you do not accept the ranking, you can challenge, everyone has the opportunity to challenge ten times, once the ten challenges are over, you cannot continue to challenge. If you don't challenge all of them, then the holy war is over!"

Subsequently, 1,000 people were ranked one by one.

Ye Tian was the first in the group, so he was ranked in the top 100, but he did not show much means in the group stage, so he was only ranked 88th, Kamigawa Sacred Son was ranked 33rd, and Star Feather Sacred Son was ranked ninth.

As soon as this ranking came out, the Holy Son of Kamigawa took a look at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian ignored the Holy Son of Shenhe, this ranking is not counted, what is there to compare?

If it weren't for the fact that he belonged to the same battle gate as Kamigawa Son, he was afraid that he would directly challenge him and pick him out of the 33rd position.

Soon, the challenge begins!

As the new saint son of the Battle Gate, Ye Qingtian has the strength of a double overlimiter, which has long been exposed, but many people think that he is just an ordinary double overlimiter, and there is no accurate estimate of his strength.

Therefore, a double overrunner outside of Ye Tian's ranking challenged Ye Tian.

The 100th Qitian Holy Son challenges the 88th Wanfa Holy Son!

After the two came to power, there was no nonsense and they fought directly.

The Holy Son of Qitian is ordinary, mastering three domain techniques, one of which has reached the realm of Xiaocheng, and is also the inheritor of the Extreme Dao, as soon as he appeared, he directly exerted the power of the Extreme Dao, and also urged a Dacheng-level holy body.

Ye Tian didn't want to waste time, so he urged the Dacheng-level Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and without opening the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, the power of the Extreme Dao was also used.

As for the domain technique, he had not cultivated it, so he did not use it.

But even so, the strength he showed was stronger than that of the Qitian Holy Son, because his foundation was too deep, and he relied on the forbidden Dao technique of the extreme level to crush the Qitian Holy Son.

The forbidden Dao technique of the extreme level of a gate was displayed in Ye Tian's hands, and it directly blinded the Holy Son of Qitian.

"You're a holy son, cultivating so many forbidden Dao techniques, and cultivating all of them to the extreme level?"

Qitian Holy Son was dumbfounded, he really wanted to say if Ye Tian was stupid!

At the half-step domain ancestor level, it is enough for everyone to create a few forbidden Dao techniques to cultivate, there is no need to create too many forbidden Dao techniques, that would be a waste of time.

If they are highly talented, they can combine their own forbidden Dao techniques and the power of their domain ancestors to directly create a domain technique that suits them, this is the path they want to take!

Who would spend time on forbidden Dao techniques!

But in the eyes of the Holy Son of Qitian, Ye Tian was too strange, and he had cultivated so many forbidden Dao techniques.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, use your domain technique to defeat me!"

The Holy Son of Qitian knew that he couldn't beat Ye Tian, so he spoke.

"I'm sorry, I haven't practiced domain arts!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

"This ...... How is that possible?"

The Holy Son of Qitian did not believe it.

But he had been fighting for half an hour, and after he was defeated, he was a little convinced that Ye Tian would not be able to do domain arts.

After all, showing a weak domain technique, you don't need to expose all your strength, you can end the battle early, there is no need to keep fighting like this.

"I can't do domain arts, Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, your ranking is like this!"

Qitian Holy Son said.

In the distance, the Holy Son of Kamigawa ended the game, and also saw Ye Tian's battle, and couldn't help but mock himself: "You dare to fight me with this strength?"
